header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

commit.message:
move all generated artifacts into .fry/, add --project-dir, fix .gitignore safety

Migrate all runtime artifacts (AGENTS.md, epic.md, verification.md, prompt.md,
sprint-progress.txt, epic-progress.txt, build-logs/, .fry.lock) from the project
root into the .fry/ directory. Add --project-dir flag to fry.sh and both prepare
scripts for operating on remote project directories. Remove deprecated --keep-*
flags from prepare scripts (all artifacts are always regenerated). Fix .gitignore
update logic to check each entry independently, preventing .env from being missed
if .fry/ was already present. Fix generate_epic() to use return instead of exit
for consistent error handling. Update all documentation to reflect .fry/ paths.

feat: initial GraveNews build — Astro + Cloudflare stack

Full satirical news site with:
- Cloudflare D1 (SQLite via Drizzle ORM) for article storage
- Cloudflare R2 for processed image storage (AVIF, server-side filters)
- Cloudflare Workers AI (Llama 3.3 70B) for article generation
- Cloudflare KV for admin sessions
- AI headline generation with word-list templates
- Structured AI article generation with narrative arc + outline
- Server-side image processing (resize, crop, compress, duotone/sepia/grayscale filters)
- React admin dashboard (article pipeline, headline generator, writer manager)
- Public frontend: homepage, article pages, category pages, article listing
- Mobile-responsive CSS design system (custom properties, no Tailwind on public pages)

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Screen Recording permission flow — correct TCC prompt timing

- Remove premature System Settings open from trigger_tcc_prompt() — was
  causing the native "Open System Settings" dialog to bring up an empty
  pane instead of adding python3.11 to the SR list
- Close System Settings before triggering TCC prompt so macOS can open
  it fresh with the binary entry
- Reorder Quartz calls: CGWindowListCreateImage first (adds binary to
  SR list), then CGRequestScreenCaptureAccess (shows native dialog)
- Reset & Retry now closes Settings, shows spinner, waits 2s before
  re-prompting
- Show resolved python binary path (not symlink) for manual addition
- Close System Settings before tccutil reset for clean state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: consistent number formatting with commas on all stat cards

Deletes the tcg_dokan_cards_js transient when new cards are created,
so they appear immediately in the vendor product form search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(install): auto-install Homebrew if missing on macOS (#11)

* feat(install): add ast-grep MCP setup and fix hooks format for Claude Code v1.x

- Fix ExitPlanMode/Stop/Notification hooks to use new format (wrap in {hooks:[...]})
- Remove ExitPlanMode from setup_hooks initial creation (jq handles it)
- Add setup_search_tools(): installs ast-grep via brew + registers MCP server
- Call setup_search_tools in both install and update modes
- Update .agents/hooks/install.sh and settings-snippet.json to new hook format
- settings-snippet.json now also includes mcpServers.ast-grep reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(hooks): remove ExitPlanMode — not a valid Claude Code hook event

ExitPlanMode is not recognized by Claude Code and causes a settings error
("Invalid key in record"). Removes it from all hook registration paths.

plan-review.sh is still installed to ~/.claude/hooks/ for manual use.
Valid hook events used: Stop, Notification, PreToolUse, PostToolUse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(install): auto-install jq via brew and check for node/npx

Adds setup_deps() that runs before hooks/MCP setup:
- Installs jq via brew if missing (required for hooks and settings.json)
- Warns if node/npx is missing (required for ast-grep MCP server)

Called in both install and update flows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(install): auto-install Homebrew if missing on macOS

setup_deps() now checks for brew first:
- macOS + no brew → installs Homebrew automatically
- non-macOS + no brew → warns to install jq/ast-grep manually

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove broken chart, implement real DFlow Proof KYC

- Remove OutcomeChart from event page (flat lines, no real data)
- KYC status check now uses real DFlow Proof API:
  GET https://proof.dflow.net/verify/{address}
- KYC initiation uses DFlow Proof deep link with wallet signature:
  Signs "Proof KYC verification: {timestamp}" message,
  redirects to dflow.net/proof with wallet, signature, timestamp
- Removed broken /api/kyc POST endpoint (no longer needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to client-side Blob uploads + signed URL redirects

Upload: browser uploads directly to Vercel Blob via client token,
removing the 4.5MB serverless function body size limit. Large files
use multipart upload automatically.

Download/Preview: GET proxy now redirects to a signed blob URL
instead of buffering the entire file in memory. Browser/video player
streams directly from Blob CDN with native Range request support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Interagent: ACK observatory PSQ endpoint adoption (psq-scoring T17)

Observatory adopting psq.unratified.org/score as canonical PSQ source,

commit.message:
:sparkles: Add Indus Valley Script TDA experiment

Persistent homology on inscription sequence embeddings from the
mayig corpus. 178 Mohenjo-daro seals: 93 H1 loops (recurring
combinatorial patterns), 15 H2 voids (forbidden zones in sign
space), 7-8 DBSCAN clusters within single site/type — internal
structure without semantic assumptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement DNA 1 — Researcher Repository (private membrane)

Single-agent private DNA: all entries visibility="private", no membrane
proof, no shared DHT. GDPR compliance by architecture.

Entry types (integrity zome):
  - ResearchStudy: study metadata (title, discipline, institution, abstract,
    pre_registration_ref)
  - PreRegisteredProtocol: locked analysis plan (analysis_plan, hypotheses,
    statistical_methods, registered_at_secs). IMMUTABLE — validate() blocks
    all updates and deletes.
  - VerifiedDataSnapshot: dataset fingerprint (data_hash: ExternalHash,
    snapshot_taken_at_secs, file_count, total_size_bytes).
  - DeclaredDeviation: wraps UndeclaredDeviation for structured deviation
    records linked from studies.

Link types: StudyToProtocol, StudyToSnapshot, StudyToDeviation.

validate(): guarded PreRegisteredProtocol immutability arms precede the
unguarded generic-update arm (engineering constraint #7).

Coordinator functions:
  Write: register_study (with institution + discipline path indexes),
         register_protocol, take_data_snapshot, declare_deviation.
  Read:  get_study, get_protocol_for_study, get_snapshots_for_study,
         get_deviations_for_study.
  Util:  compute_data_hash(Vec<u8>) → ExternalHash via sha2 (SHA-256).

Adds sha2 = "0.10" and holochain_serialized_bytes = "=0.0.56" to
workspace dependencies. cargo check passes with zero errors/warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix video 0:00: prepend API_BASE to /videos/ paths in all video components

Root cause: the client (Vercel) and server (Railway) are on different
origins. <video src="/videos/file.mp4"> was resolving to the Vercel
origin, which has no videos - only the Railway server does.

The fetch() auth interceptor in api.js only rewrites /api/* paths to
the Railway origin. Static asset paths like /videos/* were untouched,
so the browser fetched from the wrong host entirely.

Fix: prepend API_BASE (VITE_API_URL) to all localPath values before
setting them as video src or download href in VideoGenerator,
VideoGallery, and QuickVideoButton.

in the lookahead terminal.

commit.message:
Fix memory exhaustion on Render free tier (512MB)

Root causes and fixes:

1. ml_signals.run_all(): downloaded 6mo OHLCV DataFrame per ticker and
   never freed it. Add explicit del + gc.collect() after signal extraction.

2. price_data.bulk_fetch(): held the large multi-ticker yf.download()
   DataFrame in memory for the entire duration of parallel .info fetches.
   Add del data + gc.collect() immediately after OHLCV extraction.

3. market_scanner scan_market(): Semaphore(10) meant 10 concurrent scans
   each holding info dict + ml_signals DataFrame simultaneously. Reduced
   to Semaphore(3). Also add gc.collect() after scan completes.

4. Scheduler job pile-up: watchlist, sectors, breadth, and market snapshot
   all fired at the same minute. Stagger them with 2/4/6/8 min offsets.
   Also reduce watchlist refresh from every 5 min to every 10 min —
   yf.download() is too memory-intensive to run every 5 minutes.

5. Add gc.collect() after the two heaviest scheduler jobs (watchlist
   refresh and scanner report generation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
